successful_alumni.ranking_basis: Curated from official William & Mary notable-alumni, People of W&M, W&M News, and Alumni Magazine pages, prioritizing person-specific official profiles or stories with explicit class-year evidence and substantive post-graduation impact.
successful_alumni.source_summary: Extracted from official William & Mary pages on wm.edu and magazine.wm.edu, using the official notable alumni page for class-year confirmation where needed and linked official profile/story pages for career summaries.

items.name: Glenn Close
items.bio: William & Mary says Glenn Close ’74, D.A. ’89 is an Emmy, Tony, SAG and Golden Globe Awards winner and eight-time Oscar nominee who credits William & Mary as the beginning of her story.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official People of William & Mary page with explicit class-year evidence in the title and a substantive summary of her acting career; major corroborated on the official notable alumni page.

items.name: Robert M. Gates
items.bio: William & Mary says Robert M. Gates ’65, L.H.D. ’98 is a former U.S. secretary of defense and William & Mary’s 24th chancellor, with a public-service career spanning CIA leadership and cabinet service.
items.description: Former U.S. secretary of defense and university chancellor.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official People of William & Mary page with explicit class-year evidence in the title and a substantive career summary; major corroborated on the official notable alumni page.

items.name: Patton Oswalt
items.bio: William & Mary Alumni Magazine identifies Patton Oswalt ’91 as a best-selling author, standup comedian and character actor, while the official notable alumni page summarizes him as a comedian and actor known for Ratatouille and The King of Queens.
items.confirmation_label: Official William & Mary Alumni Magazine story
items.evidence_quality_note: Official William & Mary Alumni Magazine feature with person-specific headline and body text naming Patton Oswalt ’91; graduation year and major are also listed on the official notable alumni page.

items.name: Ellen Stofan
items.bio: William & Mary says Ellen Stofan ’83, D.Sc. ’16 was a former NASA chief scientist, later the Smithsonian’s under secretary for science and research, and the official notable alumni page also notes her leadership of the National Air and Space Museum.
items.description: Space scientist and Smithsonian research leader.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official People of William & Mary page with explicit class-year evidence in the title and a substantive science-leadership summary; major corroborated on the official notable alumni page.

items.name: Ted Decker
items.bio: William & Mary says Ted Decker ’85 is chair, president and CEO of The Home Depot after two decades in strategic leadership roles at the company, and the official notable alumni page repeats his chief-executive role.
items.description: Chair, president and CEO of The Home Depot.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official People of William & Mary page with explicit class-year evidence in the title and a substantive CEO profile; major corroborated on the official notable alumni page.

items.name: Nicole Lynn Lewis
items.bio: William & Mary says Nicole Lynn Lewis ’03 is a social entrepreneur, speaker, author, and founder & CEO of Generation Hope whose student-parent experience at W&M shaped her mission-driven work.
items.description: Founder and CEO of Generation Hope.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official People of William & Mary page with explicit class-year evidence in the title and a substantive impact summary; major corroborated on the official notable alumni page.

items.name: Mike Tomlin
items.bio: William & Mary lists Mike Tomlin ’95, L.H.D. ’08 among its notable alumni as former head coach of the Pittsburgh Steelers, and his official People of W&M page provides the same class-year evidence in the title.
items.description: NFL head coach and prominent football leader.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official People of William & Mary page with explicit class-year evidence in the title; the official notable alumni page supplies the person-specific coaching-role summary and major.

items.name: Charles Esten
items.bio: William & Mary says Charles Esten ’87, P ’22 is an actor, singer, songwriter and comedian, and the official notable alumni page highlights his acting work on Outer Banks and Nashville.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official People of William & Mary page with explicit class-year evidence in the title and a substantive entertainment-career summary; major corroborated on the official notable alumni page.

items.name: Walt Hickey
items.bio: W&M News reports that Walter Hickey ’12 won a Pulitzer Prize as part of Insider’s illustrated-reporting team, while the official notable alumni page describes him as a Pulitzer Prize-winning journalist and editor.
items.major: Mathematics with a concentration in Applied Mathematics
items.evidence_quality_note: Official W&M News story with person-specific achievement coverage and explicit class-year evidence in the article body; major corroborated on the official notable alumni page.

items.name: Brian Jenkins
items.bio: William & Mary says Brian Jenkins ’16 became executive director of the Armed Services Arts Partnership at age 24, grew it into the nation’s largest military arts organization, and earned a place on the 2024 Forbes 30 Under 30 list for social impact.
items.description: Executive director of the Armed Services Arts Partnership.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official People of William & Mary page with explicit class-year evidence in the title and a substantive recent leadership/impact summary; major corroborated on the official notable alumni page.

override_warnings: William & Mary alumni depth was manually improved because the generic pipeline had shallow alumni coverage.
This override relies on official William & Mary pages, using the notable alumni page for explicit class-year and major confirmation when a linked story focused more on narrative than metadata.
